title_descriptor: 79% Cotton 20% Polyester 1% Carbon Twill, Antisatic Fabric, 330 gr/m'2
page_title: 79% Cotton 20% Polyester 1% Carbon Twill, Antisatic Fabric, 330 gr/m'2 - ArWoWear T21 Static Pro Pro - Ariteks
spec_line: 330 g/m², 79% Cotton 20% Polyester 1% Carbon, Antistatic, 3/1S Twill Fabric
description_blocks: ArWoWear T21 Flame Arc Pro is heavy weight 330 g/m², 79% Cotton 20% Polyester 1% Carbon, vat dyed, antistatic workwear fabric. Due to carbon fibers used on the back side of the fabric it has antistatic certification. (EN 1149-5)

It is suitable to use on electronic industry where static electric formation is a problem. Oil and gas industry platform workers can also use it to prevent static electric related explosions on dangerous area.

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
Ar Wo Wear T21 Static Pro
330 g/m² , 79% Cotton 20% Polyester 1% Carbon, Antistatic, 3/1S Twill Fabric

ArWoWear T21 Flame Arc Pro is heavy weight 330 g/m², 79% Cotton 20% Polyester 1% Carbon, vat dyed, antistatic workwear fabric. Due to carbon fibers used on the back side of the fabric it has antistatic certification. (EN 1149-5) It is suitable to use on electronic industry where static electric formation is a problem. Oil and gas industry platform workers can also use it to prevent static electric related explosions on dangerous area. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Coveralls Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Antistatic Yes EN 1149-5 Technical Documents >> ArWoWear T21 Static Pro Data Sheet Certificates EN 1149-5 EN 1149-5 Test Report

Due to carbon fibers used on the back side of the fabric it has antistatic certification. (EN 1149-5)
It is suitable to use on electronic industry where static electric formation is a problem. Oil and gas industry platform workers can also use it to prevent static electric related explosions on dangerous area.
